	- x^2*(455*x^47 + 1820*x^46 + 6230*x^45 + 21161*x^44 + 65943*x^43 - 2934053*x^42 + 9894746*x^41 - 30790835*x^40 + 41881441*x^39 - 52880699*x^38 - 6360466*x^37 + 38141732*x^36 - 108275345*x^35 + 49267348*x^34 - 597537*x^33 + 2773351*x^32 + 121188480*x^31 + 59687370*x^30 + 454409500*x^29 - 912207774*x^28 + 1542323106*x^27 - 3452105060*x^26 + 1933013872*x^25 - 4319480087*x^24 - 51543723*x^23 - 1383634585*x^22 - 1299194549*x^21 + 1729655619*x^20 + 269961660*x^19 + 2473094535*x^18 + 1587015482*x^17 + 1800615480*x^16 + 1269246359*x^15 + 899659851*x^14 + 520931332*x^13 + 210636163*x^12 - 47881833*x^11 - 241778746*x^10 - 355531705*x^9 - 385554373*x^8 - 338170903*x^7 - 254304110*x^6 - 158864838*x^5 - 85903066*x^4 - 36908562*x^3 - 13323303*x^2 - 3230136*x - 593775)*y^10
	+ x^2*(105*x^45 + 525*x^44 + 1830*x^43 + 5737*x^42 + 16638*x^41 - 1517557*x^40 + 4470248*x^39 - 12972176*x^38 + 15151659*x^37 - 17281279*x^36 - 4152224*x^35 + 11026171*x^34 - 24107330*x^33 + 9425550*x^32 + 9192662*x^31 + 11072255*x^30 + 24123649*x^29 - 12046778*x^28 + 88929735*x^27 - 417733590*x^26 + 374890765*x^25 - 1178125644*x^24 + 569204561*x^23 - 1185455854*x^22 + 312036676*x^21 - 181338315*x^20 + 192522260*x^19 + 558166059*x^18 + 356209543*x^17 + 540239974*x^16 + 315761417*x^15 + 252326859*x^14 + 120721359*x^13 + 47560708*x^12 - 9890385*x^11 - 42727250*x^10 - 60358993*x^9 - 64093498*x^8 - 56872019*x^7 - 43593229*x^6 - 28253603*x^5 - 15893570*x^4 - 7166259*x^3 - 2741508*x^2 - 701568*x - 142506)*y^9
	- x^2*(15*x^43 + 90*x^42 + 333*x^41 + 1002*x^40 + 2682*x^39 - 651212*x^38 + 1659530*x^37 - 4408074*x^36 + 4250449*x^35 - 4283656*x^34 - 1762254*x^33 + 2350608*x^32 - 3770022*x^31 + 1056789*x^30 + 2372089*x^29 + 1670873*x^28 - 1895508*x^27 - 19288368*x^26 + 5917308*x^25 - 142121115*x^24 + 89254250*x^23 - 302019845*x^22 + 174122529*x^21 - 228689835*x^20 + 156216960*x^19 + 10699620*x^18 + 116790943*x^17 + 111727049*x^16 + 80983530*x^15 + 67485810*x^14 + 31562307*x^13 + 14366526*x^12 + 187662*x^11 - 5951022*x^10 - 8639805*x^9 - 8948521*x^8 - 7897238*x^7 - 6110334*x^6 - 4092221*x^5 - 2380822*x^4 - 1131534*x^3 - 455742*x^2 - 124236*x - 27405)*y^8
	+ x^2*(x^41 + 7*x^40 + 28*x^39 + 84*x^38 + 210*x^37 - 229768*x^36 + 494274*x^35 - 1185314*x^34 + 871143*x^33 - 788060*x^32 - 537368*x^31 + 249745*x^30 - 482517*x^29 - 190343*x^28 - 197429*x^27 - 944824*x^26 - 3108429*x^25 - 8398701*x^24 - 1301626*x^23 - 35372001*x^22 + 23203079*x^21 - 57423949*x^20 + 46513895*x^19 - 30627212*x^18 + 41338511*x^17 + 7702489*x^16 + 24255493*x^15 + 13384106*x^14 + 9347185*x^13 + 4203829*x^12 + 1121598*x^11 - 441960*x^10 - 950502*x^9 - 1016639*x^8 - 874801*x^7 - 675790*x^6 - 463201*x^5 - 277451*x^4 - 139352*x^3 - 58768*x^2 - 17284*x - 4060)*y^7
	+ x^2*(65780*x^34 - 113620*x^33 + 245830*x^32 - 112645*x^31 + 111241*x^30 + 124559*x^29 + 39848*x^28 + 106543*x^27 + 159543*x^26 + 274685*x^25 + 542921*x^24 + 1095535*x^23 + 2138151*x^22 + 145512*x^21 + 6428302*x^20 - 5693901*x^19 + 8016916*x^18 - 9451328*x^17 + 2742473*x^16 - 6871354*x^15 - 1235893*x^14 - 2841790*x^13 - 885111*x^12 - 569142*x^11 - 54564*x^10 + 45900*x^9 + 88779*x^8 + 73158*x^7 + 55607*x^6 + 38430*x^5 + 23613*x^4 + 12508*x^3 + 5517*x^2 + 1776*x + 435)*y^6
	- x^2*(14950*x^32 - 18850*x^31 + 38025*x^30 - 3874*x^29 + 15160*x^28 + 23325*x^27 + 23265*x^26 + 32745*x^25 + 50901*x^24 + 82513*x^23 + 135602*x^22 + 221706*x^21 + 355885*x^20 - 101287*x^19 + 846318*x^18 - 1106078*x^17 + 802931*x^16 - 1369305*x^15 + 146468*x^14 - 732155*x^13 - 97776*x^12 - 190371*x^11 - 24045*x^10 - 13839*x^9 + 5328*x^8 + 4146*x^7 + 3045*x^6 + 2085*x^5 + 1305*x^4 + 723*x^3 + 336*x^2 + 120*x + 30)*y^5
	+ x^2*(2600*x^30 - 1950*x^29 + 4225*x^28 + 1580*x^27 + 2555*x^26 + 3739*x^25 + 5004*x^24 + 6845*x^23 + 9663*x^22 + 13849*x^21 + 19794*x^20 + 27889*x^19 + 38525*x^18 - 39297*x^17 + 78864*x^16 - 155071*x^15 + 54739*x^14 - 133638*x^13 + 3104*x^12 - 46355*x^11 - 3324*x^10 - 5765*x^9 + 165*x^8 + 120*x^7 + 84*x^6 + 56*x^5 + 35*x^4 + 20*x^3 + 10*x^2 + 4*x + 1)*y^4
	- x^11*(325*x^19 - 65*x^18 + 335*x^17 + 320*x^16 + 385*x^15 + 486*x^14 + 633*x^13 + 826*x^12 + 1065*x^11 + 1350*x^10 + 1681*x^9 + 2058*x^8 + 2481*x^7 - 6930*x^6 + 5025*x^5 - 14574*x^4 + 2336*x^3 - 7857*x^2 - 30*x - 1330)*y^3
	+ x^11*(26*x^17 + 10*x^16 + 21*x^15 + 27*x^14 + 33*x^13 + 39*x^12 + 45*x^11 + 51*x^10 + 57*x^9 + 63*x^8 + 69*x^7 + 75*x^6 + 81*x^5 - 693*x^4 + 213*x^3 - 819*x^2 + 51*x - 210)*y^2
	- x^11*(x^15 + x^14 + x^13 + x^12 + x^11 + x^10 + x^9 + x^8 + x^7 + x^6 + x^5 + x^4 + x^3 - 39*x^2 + 5*x - 21)*y
	- x^11;
r:= (x^2*y - x*y + y - 1) / (x^2*y - x);
s:=(x*y - y + 1) / (x*y);
E:=[s-r*s+1,r*s-r^2*s,r*s-r^2*s,0,0];
P:=[0,0];
